task_description: Reality-check the claimed Premium Shopify Header work on the feature/premium-header-phase-5 branch, then ship the verified files to main. Three rounds of semantic review followed: v1 raised 10 findings, v2 raised 4, v3 verdict APPROVED. After v1 fixes, hp_ count moved from 46 to 47 (added hp_cart_badge_override gate so flipping the master toggle does not silently repaint Dawn's color-scheme accent on the cart badge).

verification.summary: No traditional build or test framework (Shopify theme). Validator at .agents/tasks/task-ship-premium-header/validate.py runs 7 checks: schema JSON validity, hp_ count == 47, range math, Liquid block balance, hp_ usage coverage (literal + --hp- + data-hp- forms), no null in liquid, no width=auto. Exits 0 against final paths. Ignore.zip untouched. Four commits: 9268703 feat ship; 2e2b5a0 fix v1; 50f08a9 fix v2; fd08705 chore v3 review.
